No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to hunger, food security, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to health, well-being, or healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops fundamental language skills, practical application, professional research, teaching, and global mobility (Targets 4.4, 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to energy access, renewables, or efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops language skills and 'Abilities of global mobility,' which are relevant for employment and decent work, indirectly supporting Target 8.5.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Developing 'Abilities of global mobility' through language learning can foster intercultural understanding, indirectly supporting social inclusion (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to sustainable urbanization or community development.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The 'Respect Copyright' instruction is better aligned with Goal 16. No other evidence supports responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' promotes adherence to intellectual property laws, a minor aspect of promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops language skills and 'Abilities of global mobility,' which are essential enabling tools for international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
